headline: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) Shows Strong Technical Breakout Setup with 7/10 TA Rating and 9/10 Setup Quality
summary: Edison International (EIX) scores a strong 7/10 Technical Rating and 9/10 Setup Quality, signaling a potential technical breakout. With a tight consolidation zone and defined entry at $74.04, this utility stock offers a low-risk setup for trend traders.
